headline: Extra Space Storage (EXR) Faces New Supply Risks—So Why Is Wall Street Still Bullish?
summary: With a short percentage of shares outstanding of 2.20%, Extra Space Storage Inc. (NYSE:EXR) is among the 7 Best “Land Owner” Stocks to Buy for Hard Asset Value. On May 27, Mizuho raised its price target on Extra Space Storage Inc. (NYSE:EXR) to $155 from $150 while maintaining an Outperform rating on the shares. Although the firm noted potential demand risks […]
